ideal_must_detect.matched_text: P r o j e c t   Q u o l l
must not be issued before the embargo
if the definitive agreement is not executed by 30 Sep 2026, all items tagged NP-1042A must be returned or destroyed with certificate in 10 business days

Scope: Processor will handle HR onboarding files, health declarations for site access, payroll/credit assessment reports, and transaction ledgers supporting the contemplated Scheme Implementation Deed with Tammar Renewables Holdings No. 2 Pty Ltd (definitive agreement draft v5).
Disclosure control: draft investor-release held in IR/Embargo/2026-08-14 and must not be issued before the embargo; breach to be escalated for a trading halt under ASX Listing Rule 17.1.

Counterparty limitation: nothing here permits disclosure to media or any party other than Tammar Renewables Holdings No. 2 Pty Ltd; if the definitive agreement is not executed by 30 Sep 2026, all items tagged NP-1042A must be returned or destroyed with certificate in 10 business days.
Compliance note: this is not investment advice; see ASIC Regulatory Guides and ASX Guidance Note 8; as previously covered in the ASX announcement dated 12 Feb 2025 (public).

must_detect.matched_text:
43 777 120 930); effective 15 Jul 2026; ASX embargo until 14 Aug 2026 09:00 AEST.
Privacy Officer: Dr. Mira Kelso, privacy@wallarooenergy.example.au, +61 2 8012 4477; Escalation: Mr. Jaxon Reid, General Counsel, j.reid@wallarooenergy.example.au.
Scope: Processor will handle HR onboarding files, health declarations for site access, payroll/credit assessment reports, and transaction ledgers supporting the contemplated Scheme Implementation Deed with Tammar Renewables Holdings No. 2 Pty Ltd (definitive agreement draft v5).
Legal basis: Australian Privacy Principles (APPs), Privacy Act 1988 (Cth), Notifiable Data Breaches scheme, ASIC/ASX continuous disclosure settings; OAIC contact pathways maintained.
Data classes: board memos, term sheets, internal research notes, investor-relations Q&A drafts, and deal checklists (MNPI) stored in Sydney region for 7 years post-completion; hashed employee IDs format “EID-xx##-###”.
Transfers: Cross-border disclosure is prohibited unless APAC-standard clauses are executed; temporary analytics transfer to node ap-southeast-2/quoll via https://pdata.sableds.example.au/xfer?doc=BRD%2F2026%2FQ-014.
Universal MNPI markers: codename “P r o j e c t   Q u o l l”; internal tag “NP-1042A”; funding amount AUD 82,500,000; proposed placement up to 9.9% to Quiet River Funds SPC; board approval threshold 75%.
For clarity, scheduled maintenance overruns and routine contractor injuries do not constitute a Material Adverse Change under clause 9.2 of the SID.
Disclosure control: draft investor-release held in IR/Embargo/2026-08-14 and must not be issued before the embargo; breach to be escalated for a trading halt under ASX Listing Rule 17.1.
DSAR: request access or correction via dsar@wallarooenergy.example.au quoting Cust# AU-44X3-9Z and last payroll date; we respond within 30 days per APP 12/13.
Retention workflow: HR and health files 7 years from separation; credit files 5 years; transaction ledgers 7 years; MNPI bundles restricted until public release + 180 days; auto-delete job “koala-cron” runs 03:15 AEST daily.
todo: move v5 redlines to sid\2026\final, ping finance, hold until monday after spa day; no pr before gate 4.
Public-source note: 2024 sustainability metrics referenced are taken from the published 2024 ESG report (public) and are not MNPI.
Security: all access logged; sample report at h t t p s : / / logs.wallarooenergy.example.au /?rid=Q-014&mask=on; exceptions routed to ops@wallarooenergy.example.au; OAIC audit pack available within 48h.
De-identification: before analytics, names reduced to Given[1]-Surname[3] and mobiles masked to “+61••• ••1 9 0”; Ms. Eliza Noor
